PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?country ?countryLabel ?flag ?flagLabel WHERE {
  ?flag wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q25231 .
  ?flag wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?flag wdt:P462 wd:Q813 .
  ?flag wdt:P462 wd:Q23444 .
  ?flag wdt:P163 ?design .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  ?flag rdfs:label ?flagLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?flagLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(REGEX(?design , "circle" , "i"))
  FILTER(REGEX(?design , "stars" , "i"))
}
LIMIT 10
